subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enkindled by the fire of the love of God! I read thy detailed letter and noted its wondrous contents. Render thanks unto God that He rescued thee
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها المشتعله بنار محبه الله انی قرات مکتوبک المشروح و اطلعت بمضمونه البدیع
subcodes.subjects: @marriage as means of spiritual progress, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
